title: pouteria guillauminii
intro: Pouteria guillauminii, also known as the Guillaumin's pouteria, is a species of tree in the family Sapotaceae. It is a plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues. The bark and leaves of Pouteria guillauminii are rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which provide anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits. Herbal preparations of Pouteria guillauminii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
